attempt: Transfer TICKET50's rule: when a local obstruction fails at a higher horizon, do not hide the failure. Promote the exception as the next stress witness and state the exact terminal obstruction.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: If an exact-gap selector obstruction fails at a larger sieve level, promote the surviving gap-2 residue packet as the next sieve-weight stress witness.

obstruction: This transfer does not solve the target problem. It upgrades the research protocol so a failed local obstruction becomes a sharper witness rather than a discarded negative result.
